# Activity Sample Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize activity sample file parsing and aggregation under shared ownership. They pin multi-file step aggregation, sample interval projection, malformed activity-sample file policy, and the current Android/iOS behavior split for malformed payload handling. `ActivitySummaryCommonPolicyTest.kt` provides executable shared common policy coverage for aggregation, interval projection, activity-info mapping, unresolved malformed-file policy, and `activity-summary-readiness.json` behavior-family coverage for activity request paths, step aggregation, interval and activity-info projection, malformed activity-sample policy, automatic HR trigger mapping, automatic HR array preservation, PPI delta/status decoding, daily-summary request path/scalar/duration projection, platform activity vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate` before activity sample parsing or cleanup workflows move into common code.
